### SWE Bench Flask 5063 Paths
*~18,000 tokens/session saved*
- For Flask 5063, inspect `src/flask/cli.py` first for `flask routes`; command/table code is around `routes_command` near lines 990-1070.
- Route CLI tests live in `tests/test_cli.py` around lines 410-520; search that file before broad test-tree scans.

### Search Scope
*~9,000 tokens/session saved*
- For locating Flask route CLI behavior, use one scoped search such as `rg -n "routes_command|flask routes|routes" src/flask/cli.py tests/test_cli.py` instead of chaining `find` plus multiple `grep` passes.

### Forge Shell Guardrails
*~1,131 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid repeated `mcp__forge__shell` commands starting with `cd /home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe...`; set the working directory once in one consolidated shell script or use `mcp__forge__read_file`/`mcp__forge__search` for file inspection.
- If a probe needs several checks, combine them into one bounded command instead of rerunning near-identical `cd ... && python/pytest/grep` variants.
